trending_topics.context: 2 posts, 1.76x baseline rate — mentioning Fireblocks Earn, Galaxy Curator, long.xyz, Fireblocks

sample_posts.text:
PRODUCT UPDATE:
@longdotxyz
now supports launches paired with tokenized stock tokens from Robinhood Chain. 5 KOLs we track followed in the last 24h.
Caught early on
leak.me

Galaxy launches institutional DeFi vault services on Morpho –
Link
Galaxy Digital launched "Galaxy Curator," an institutional-grade treasury management service built on Morpho and available to 2,400+ institutional clients through Fireblocks Earn. It lets institutions earn on-chain yields on idle stablecoins without managing DeFi infrastructure directly.
Matters because:
It removes a key barrier to institutional DeFi adoption and could bring more stablecoin liquidity into yield protocols.

convergence.context: 3 posts across 3 channels (leakmealpha, muur_posts, shoalresearch) — mentioning Fireblocks Earn, Galaxy Curator, long.xyz, Fireblocks

sample_posts.text:
FTX to Begin Fifth Creditor Distribution Worth Approximately $900M on July 31
> FTX will begin its fifth round of creditor distributions, totaling approximately $900 million, on July 31, 2026, for eligible holders of allowed claims who have completed all pre-distribution requirements.
Source:
https://x.com/FTX_Official/status/2078171419754598494

tweet.text: FTX announced it will begin its Fifth Distribution of ~$900 million on 7/31/26 to holders of allowed claims in the Plan’s Convenience and Non-Convenience Classes that have completed the pre-distribution requirements.

sample_posts.text:
Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s Jacket Has Sold at Sotheby’s for $960,000
Source:
https://x.com/LongJourneyVC/status/2078198778839130611

tweet.text:
The final number for the iconic Jensen Jacket went for $960,000. We are blown away and so deeply moved. 

All proceeds go towards funding the next generation of young minds to build the world they imagine (through grants and fellowships) at Edge City (of whom we are so proud to be a second believer).  

Thank you first and foremost to Jensen for his generosity and care. Thank you also to the Sotheby's team for working with us on this philanthropic initiative.   Most importantly congratulations and thank you to the winner of this legendary jacket. We are excited to host you for a Denny's meal a

tweet.text: 7 hours ago an attacker managed to exploit DefiTuna Lending pools and extract $580,000 which means that the USDC lending pool is currently at a $580,000 deficit. The attack vector was identified and mitigated however we are still investigating the issue. more information will be made available soon. The team is working on trying to recover the funds.

tweet.text:
After spending the last two years building the MegaMafia, we’ve decided to sunset the program. 

While it was a success in many ways, we believe that the program was built on assumptions that no longer hold. 

Here are some reflections, and what’s coming up next.

> We had real conviction in Mafia founders, and have gone above and beyond in standing by their side to bring their products to market. Some examples include: restructuring the GTE leadership team during critical moments just one month after their initial pre-seed raise, offering to buy out Noise's investors when they tried to push o

tweet.text:
At ~5:30 AM UTC today, Across was attacked on Solana. User funds are safe. No users were affected, and all bridge transactions have been completed.

Solana deposits have been disabled. The protocol is otherwise operating unaffected.

The only funds potentially lost belong to the relayer operated by Risk Labs (the foundation supporting Across).

Addresses that we are tracking with @SEAL_911:
8bkoZToaTBBtAPczgHqD4XVxWtvBkiy4crtexEtYDYSL
0xa0C0e9f307b5A26cA3FB5891c19154fc7A02BeF7
0xA6fb971F3B7a9b9F76EdA76bc89268fe26560189

We will post additional information as we have it, and a full post mortem

sample_posts.text:
Across Protocol Hit by Solana Exploit, User Funds Safe but Risk Labs Relayer Potentially Impacted

Source:
https://x.com/AcrossProtocol/status/2078036118209982566

Solana deposits have been disabled. The protocol is otherwise operating unaffected.

The only funds potentially lost belong to the relayer operated by Risk Labs (the foundation supporting Across).

Addresses that we are tracking with @SEAL_911:
8bkoZToaTBBtAPczgHqD4XVxWtvBkiy4crtexEtYDYSL
0xa0C0e9f307b5A26cA3FB5891c19154fc7A02BeF7
0xA6fb971F3B7a9b9F76EdA76bc89268fe26560189

We will post additional information as we have it, and a full post mortem

https://x.com/AcrossProtocol/status/2078036118209982566

tweet.text: 7 hours ago an attacker managed to exploit DefiTuna Lending pools and extract $580,000 which means that the USDC lending pool is currently at a $580,000 deficit. The attack vector was identified and mitigated however we are still investigating the issue. more information will be made available soon. The team is working on trying to recover the funds.

tweet.text:
After spending the last two years building the MegaMafia, we’ve decided to sunset the program. 

While it was a success in many ways, we believe that the program was built on assumptions that no longer hold. 

Here are some reflections, and what’s coming up next.

> We had real conviction in Mafia founders, and have gone above and beyond in standing by their side to bring their products to market. Some examples include: restructuring the GTE leadership team during critical moments just one month after their initial pre-seed raise, offering to buy out Noise's investors when they tried to push o

It supports tables, headings, inline media, lists, AI content, formulas, and more.

Available only to Premium subscribers, because otherwise we’d have to call it Poor Text Editor ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s Jacket Has Sold at Sotheby’s for $960,000
Source:
https://x.com/LongJourneyVC/status/2078198778839130611

tweet.text:
The final number for the iconic Jensen Jacket went for $960,000. We are blown away and so deeply moved. 

All proceeds go towards funding the next generation of young minds to build the world they imagine (through grants and fellowships) at Edge City (of whom we are so proud to be a second believer).  

Thank you first and foremost to Jensen for his generosity and care. Thank you also to the Sotheby's team for working with us on this philanthropic initiative.   Most importantly congratulations and thank you to the winner of this legendary jacket. We are excited to host you for a Denny's meal a

sample_posts.text:
Trust or Verify: The Case for Private AI
“
Trust
- for tasks that are execution-and agent-heavy
…
For the higher-level thinking that separates a firm from its rivals, V
erify.
”
> The piece argues that as frontier labs' IP leakage concerns mount, the performance overhead of verifiable privacy is now compressing to near-zero.
> The real opportunity lies in the unsolved gaps: private training loops inside enclaves, sealed agent tool calls, and blind search indexes
Source:
https://x.com/IOSGVC/status/2078021724017500531
